mapper.sql: f.id, f.park_id, p.name AS park_name, f.building_id, b.name AS building_name, f.floor_no, f.area, f.status, f.memo, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time

COALESCE(rs.used_area, 0) AS used_area, COALESCE(rs.total_count, 0) AS total_count, COALESCE(rs.rented_count, 0) AS rented_count, COALESCE(rs.vacant_count, 0) AS vacant_count, COALESCE(rs.reserved_count, 0) AS reserved_count, COALESCE(rs.renovating_count, 0) AS renovating_count, COALESCE(rs.disabled_count, 0) AS disabled_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT building_id, floor, COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)) AS used_area, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reserved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS renovating_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS disabled_count FROM ics_room GROUP BY building_id, floor ) rs ON rs.building_id = f.building_id AND rs.floor = f.floor_no
ORDER BY p.name ASC, b.name ASC, f.floor_no DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id

SELECT ,
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id

SELECT ,
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id
WHERE f.building_id = #{buildingId} AND f.floor_no = #{floorNo} ORDER BY f.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT f.floor_no AS floorNo, f.area FROM ics_floor f WHERE f.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY f.floor_no ASC

SELECT r.id, r.park_id, p.name AS park_name, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.name, r.floor, r.area, r.rent_price, r.property_fee, r.house_type, r.orientation, r.address, r.facilities, r.highlights, r.scene_images, r.floor_plan_images, r.status, r.sync_status, r.sync_time, r.memo, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time FROM ics_room r LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = r.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = r.park_id WHERE r.building_id = #{buildingId} AND r.floor = #{floorNo} AND r.status = #{roomStatus} ORDER BY r.name ASC, r.id ASC
